reviews.title: hotel in the wrong place
reviews.text:
unfortunately, we never got to stay at the hotel.
it was advertised under 'chau doc' and - being new to the area - we did not know it was 50 kms away.  arriving late in the evening, we had no option but to stay elsewhere and it looks like we have had to forefeit two nights accommodation.
i would like to see this hotel removed from the 'chau doc' area of agoda's search.  it is MISLEADING and very disappointing.
reviews.positives: not in chau doc

reviews.title: Centrally located, big room, great price.
reviews.positives: Location was great, beautiful view for breakfast. Massage on the second floor!
reviews.negatives: Big empty hotel, a bit dated. Good place to film a horror movie.

reviews.title: Poor
reviews.text: Poorly managed property, faulty ac, irregular cleaning of room, mostly very grumpy staff, pool out of use, breakfast one of the worst I experienced in Asia.  Overall a very low standard

reviews.title: Enjoyed my stay and was allowed late check out by 1pm instead of 12pm.
reviews.positives: Buffet Breakfast spread has reasonable variety and is good. Hotel has ample free parking space compared to other hotels in this city. Located within 1 km in the city center area.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Price and location were OK. The bathtub in the bathroom leaked water and flooded the entire toilet when it was used. The in-house massage was the worst we experienced. The masseuse did not seem to have any basic massage skills, and kept wanting to offer male guests additional services. Breakfast had a good spread but was not appetising.

I did the reservation on line and show them... not a word, not a comment. I did not find their behevoir professional and custmer oriented as it should be.

I stayed here from 23/1 to 25/1.
After first night, I left the hotel asked the counter to had house keeping.
But they didn't, response to the counter.
Very lousy English and only understood to changed towels.
Even the bellboy understand English more good than the counter staff.

reviews.title: government owned hotel, not 4 star standard
reviews.text: Hoa Binh is a large government owned hotel.  The front desk had wanted to keep our passports overnight (after holding on to it for 6 hours) for processing since they have to send the bellhop out to get copies of passports made.  The room is spacious and comfortable.  Cleanliness is not this hotel's strength.  The bathtub is moldy and the pool is rather green.  The hotel's lobby and hallway are clean.   Long Xuyen does not have many hotels so this one does not have much competition.  It claims to be a 4 stars hotel, but its standard is at best a 2.5.
reviews.positives: air-conditioning, air-conditioning, decent restaurant

reviews.positives:

Les lits, grands et confortables
reviews.negatives:
La difficulté de compréhension avec le personnel.
Hôtel vieillissant.
Le salon de massage : à fuir !!! Expérience horrible, à  priori ce ne sont pas des masseuses !

reviews.title: Not professional in service.
reviews.text: There is nothing unprofessional like a 3-star. The service staff is okay, but the non-service staff is doing things randomly. Maintenance and security staff should stay in their designated positions. In a big hotel, we have staff stationed right at the elevator to assist guests with going up and down. On the 8th floor, there are staff dressed like maintenance standing by the elevator buttons, and when guests say something, this person argues back. Elderly guests should be prioritized to enter the elevator first. When I mention it, they argue that it’s because I’m standing in line behind them. However, we should prioritize elderly people, children, and hotel guests to enter the elevator first. This staff member's name is Tho. He doesn’t dress like the other service staff. I see that these staff members are not in their proper positions like in the 3 or 4-star hotels I have stayed at. Service staff are trained, while these guys are just maintenance, and they should be where they need to be, not in the hotel restaurant. On top of that, they seem to want to argue with guests. At first, I was going to give 5 stars, but after that incident, I don't think it’s deserved. One bad apple spoils the bunch. Guest room 502, from January 28-30, 2025.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: le calme la chambre et la piscine
reviews.negatives: les bouteilles d’eau, les noodles et les biscuits sont payants mais rien n’est inscrit excepté « enjoy »

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hôtel près du centre. Personnel accueillant et très serviable. La chambre était grande et propre mais aurait besoin d'être un peu modernisée.  Excellent buffet petit-déjeuner. Petite piscine agréable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Cet Hôtel est très bien placé dans Long xuen.
Nous y avons séjourné une nuit, arrivée à  20h et départ à 5h pour aller au marché flottant de Long Xuen puis nous sommes revenu pour le petit déjeuner.
Nous avons pu aller aller dans le centre en marchant que quelques minutes.
La chambre est confortable et spacieuse.
Le vrai plus est la vue de la terrasse ou l'on prend le petit-déjeuner avec une belle vue sur la ville.
Le petit déjeuner était l'un des meilleurs pris au Vietnam.

Le phở Y est très bon

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Overall, the stay was uneventful. Hotel is old, furniture is dated. Breakfast is good with decent selections. Staff is friendly. Room rate is fairly expensive giving the hotel age, room condition and no other resort style services amenities available. We stayed in other hotel, in Phuong My Binh on Hung Vuong street, for the prior 4 nights and felt very satisfied and very worth for the money.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'accueil, l'attention du personnel, le petit déjeuner sur la terrasse, la literie excellente, la propreté de la chambre et du linge.
reviews.negatives: Un peu dommage que l'environnement de la piscine ne soit pas plus soigné. Vue sur le chantier à côté  et sur l'arrière de l'hôtel.

reviews.title: More like 2 stars
reviews.text: Staff at hotel are pretty friendly and helpful, however it's rating as a 4 star is highly misleading. Everything is old and dingy and the walls were disgusting and ceiling in bathroom had mold all over. Breakfast was decent.

reviews.title: Hotel de bonne catégorie

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Merci beaucoup à toute l'équipe de la réception très bienveillante lors de mi séjour.
L'équipe aux petits soins m'a aidé sur la réservation de mon transfert par car et tout à été merveilleusement organisé.
BRAVO à tous et aux 2 personnes également adorables en charges des bagages et de l'ascenseur, toujours adorables et souriants.
Merci encore pour ces beaux moments car si j'ai passé un beau séjour c'est grâce à vous !

reviews.title: Top Ausstattung mit excellentem Frühstücksbuffet!
reviews.positives:
Auch wenn ich nur eine Nacht dort war, habe ich einen sehr guten Eindruck bekommen. Es is kein Urlaubshotel, aber ein Business Hotel mit allem was man benötigt! Aber auch im Urlaub bzw einer Vietnamrundreise für ein oder zwei Nächte absolut zu empfehlen, da es ein außergewöhnliches excellentes Frühstücksbuffet gibt. Personal spricht Englisch. 
Ich lebe übrigens seit 8 Jahren in Vietnam und habe nicht viel besseres erlebt! DANKE

Nice, clean and central place to stay in Long Xuyen. The staff were incredible; very helpful and welcoming, made our stay so pleasant!

Lastly air conditioning was strong; very important!

reviews.title: Nice hotel for a short stay to visit the floating market
reviews.positives:
Great hotel for a stopover. We stayed in this hotel for 1 night so that we could visit the floating market in the morning. I think the hotel is mostly used by business customers. English was difficult but the staff was very friendly and did their best to make us feel comfortable. 
The breakfast was good. You can have breakfast on the roof terrace from where you have a nice view. 
The floating market is not touristy, not very big but certainly a special experience. We went to the harbor around 5.30. After the tour there is also a lively market on the quay.
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: Long Xuyen
reviews.text: I enjoyed my stay. Great location. Pool could do with some attention and the restaurant at night was disappointing. Menu limited for one person and service slow. Breakfast buffet good. All staff friendly.
reviews.positives: Staff are friendly and always helpful. Very clean and up to date to western standards.

reviews.title: Comfy
reviews.text: My girlfriend stayed at this hotel and absolutely loved it. The location is safe with lots of good seafood restaurants within walking distance. The reception is very friendly and helpful. The room is big and has a very nice restroom, which is a big complement coming from a girl. The bed is perhaps the best part of the room – the girl kept on raving how the mattress is thick and plush making it the best bed she has slept in. Definitely recommended!
reviews.positives: Location, staff, nice room

reviews.title: Best hotel in Long Xuyen
reviews.text:
Really enjoyed our stay. The staff were so  friendly and helpful and couldn't do enough. The breakfast was great - tasty and plenty of choice. 

The hotel has a large spacious foyer which is great for relaxing or meeting up with people.

We will definitely stay here again.
reviews.positives: Really friendly and helpful staff, clean spacious rooms, great breakfast buffet

reviews.title: Worth booking
reviews.text: Although the facilities are old fashioned, but rooms are clean and spacious. Morning buffet is delicious. Especially the staff is very nice and courteous.

reviews.title: I often use Hoa Binh 1, and there is no place as good as this nearby.
reviews.text: This is probably the best place to visit in Long Xuyen. I do wish there were better hotels here, but the breakfast is decent and it serves as a sufficient alternative.

Gia đình mình thấy rất ấn tượng vì hiếm khách sạn nào bọn mình đi mà có cảm giác như ở nhà vậy.  Phòng ốc sạch sẽ. Ăn sáng đa dạng. Hồ bơi hơi nhỏ nhưng cũng tạm đủ dùng.  Ở Long Xuyên ít ks thì ở đây chất lượng và dịch vụ như vậy là quá tuyệt vời

reviews.title: Nice & clean room, very Friendly staff
reviews.text: Room was very clean and nice. Staff is very friendly and helpful...even remember your name. Location is good as near local eateries. Highly recommend to stay here. Well done, Excellent stay.

reviews.title: Great value and quality
reviews.text: The hotel is old and need some maintenance. Other than that, it's great for the price. Staff were awesome, very attentive without being intrusive. Breakfast had a lot of choices for Vietnamese and western taste and tasted good too. The best breakfast  in my five years staying at various 5 and 4 stars hotels in the whole Vietnam. Definitely will come back and stay in this hotel again if I am in the region again. I highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Best choice in this area
reviews.text: I cant expect such great rooms with such price level. Yes, its real 4 star hotel and best hotel in town. Maybe lobby looks not so cool, but hotel interior very nice. Room is enough big, with nice design, bathroom with bath, huge mirror. City view is outstanding on sunset. Breakfast is not perfect, but pretty good (its buffet type, so you will always have choice). I hope some day they will make gym and good swimming pool in hotel to make it perfect.
reviews.positives: Good room, nice view, perfect price

reviews.title: Great view, helpful staff, amazing breakfast
reviews.text: It was our first time booking hotels on Agoda, and I was wary of trusting photos where you can't know what's around the corner from what you're seeing. But we were very pleased with every place we stayed. Clean, comfortable, affordable. Hoa Binh in particular had very friendly staff and a great breakfast. They helped arrange a floating market tour. The pool was a tiny bit deep for our 5 and 3 year olds, but we were happy to swim nonetheless!

reviews.title: what a great oasis in the delta
reviews.text: A very pleasant surprise, our preferred hotel was fully booked so Hoa Binh was our second choice. Not any more, will stay here every time I am in the delta. Staff was so helpful with good English, the hotel was very well maintained, not always a big thing in Vietnam. Good breakfast with great views.
reviews.positives: staff performance, rooms, cleanliness

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: We stayed here for 1 night and everything was good.

reviews.title: Comfort in the Mekong ❤️
reviews.text:
Everything good 👍 great buffet breakfast 👍 room great AC, comfortable bed and a good night’s sleep.❤️ nice hot shower and bath.🐳
But the best thing is staff always available to help you.❤️

It’s a nice place to stay and good value for money,
The breakfast is really good with many options,

reviews.title: Experience 1 night at the hotel.
reviews.text:
- Advantages: has a swimming pool, clean and tidy, super friendly staff 🥰🥺
- Disadvantages: some minor damage to the facilities. The power outlets and switches are a bit dangerous (few outlets). The elevator is quite dark when in operation...🤭🤕 
#Breakfast is a bit cold and dusty...🤔

reviews.title: Assessment
reviews.text:
The hotel is relatively good, and the staff is very enthusiastic.

Some points that are not good: the bathroom is still old, although it is clean. 
The lights should be white; due to the wooden interior, the brown color makes the room darker.
The food was also not up to standard.

reviews.title: Traveling with family
reviews.text: The room rates are affordable, but the rooms are spacious and clean, the staff is enthusiastic, and there is ample parking space. The downside is that the breakfast buffet is not very tasty and lacks variety! Rating: 5⭐️. I will return next time.

The staff is very enthusiastic. The parking space is spacious. The downside is the internet is unstable, sometimes it works and sometimes it doesn't.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I want to thank Zhoukang Hotel for keeping the price of peaceful accommodations so low, but star-rated hotels aren't that bad either. I've gotten used to staying there in the past few years, and I will continue to stay there in the future.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Best Hotel in Long Xuygen!
reviews.text: This is definitely the best hotel in long xuygen, compared to anything in town, i would say upmarket but so cheap!
reviews.positives: Beautiful large rooms, very comfortable beds, very good shower and hot water!

reviews.title: Séjour décevant à Long Xuyen
reviews.text:
Le wifi ne marchait nulle part sauf devant l'ascenseur au RDC!La salle de bain de la chambre très vieille, sans bonde d'évacuation au lavabo, robinet de douche cassé et vidange coincée, lumière faible dans la chambre. Le coffre ne marchait pas et personne ne venait quand nous avons appelé. Tentative d'arnaque très désagréable au salon de massage, d'autant plus que personne ne parlait anglais. On nous dit à l'accueil qu'il y a une piscine : en fait elle était un peu verte, non nettoyée avec des insectes flottants, donc on ne s'est pas baigné.
Je ne recommande pas cet hôtel.
reviews.positives: la terrasse au dernier étage pour prendre un verre

reviews.title: Propre et confortable
reviews.text: Tres bien excepté que ma chambre familial a été changé pour 2 doubles légèrement plus cher et qu'il m'a été très difficile d'obtenir une facture auprès de la réception.
reviews.positives: Literie, piscine, rooftop

reviews.title: Bon Hotel
reviews.text:
Bon Hotel à Long Xuyen, probablement un des meilleurs au vu des autres hotels en ville. 
Le restaurant offre un buffet petit déjeuner standard, rien d'exceptionel mais pas mauvais non plus.  Je dirai que l'hôtel est valable pour un court séjour

reviews.title: Hotel grand confort dans la province d'An Giang
reviews.text:
Idéal pour bien se reposer et organiser un voyage d'affaire à Long Xuyen.
L'hotel offre un cadre reposant et un service de restauration de bonne qualité
reviews.positives: Confort des chambres

reviews.title: Très bon sejour
reviews.text:
Très bel hôtel avec terrasse sur le toit pour boire un verre, proche des commerces. Petit déjeuner classique. Personnels aux petits soins et accueillants. Manque chaises longues à la piscine, pas très grande mais nous étions seuls. 
Nous reviendrons !

reviews.title: Beau pied à terre à Long Xuyen
reviews.text:
L'hôtel est parfait, et le personnel très attentif.
Malheureusement, le français n'a pas cours, et l'anglais pas toujours.
Immense bâtiment un peu impersonnel, mais la piscine est vraiment agréable...

reviews.title: Séjours à Hòa bình 1 hotel
reviews.text:
C'est la 2ème fois je suis séjourné à HB1 hotel @Long xuyên .
Excellent services et très bonne réception .Emplacement proche du centre ville et chambre propre et calme .
Je recommande .
Je retournerai probablement ...
reviews.response:
Thanks so much. We look forward to serve you next time.
FOM. Chí Còn (Mr)

reviews.title: Schechter Service und null Ahnung von allem
reviews.text: Das Zimmer und die Lage war OK  und  ein ungeschultes Personal vom allergeinsten. Der Pool war grauenvoll aber das Personal meinte, man könnte trotzdem rein obwohl der trüb und gekippt war und eine braune Brühe sogar hinterher kam.  Als Entschuldigung wollten die uns mit einem frisch gepresstem Orangendrink kommen. Unfassbar mies :-) Nie wieder!

reviews.title: Preis-Leistung OK.
reviews.text: Ich bin insgesamt zufrieden, gutes Personal, ausreichend und vielfältiges Frühstück, auch sauber und gute Aussicht, Preis-Leistung absolut OK.
reviews.positives: Service Personal, Lage , Frühstück auf Dachterasse

reviews.title: Zeer gastvrij, mooi gelegen resort met heel matig restaurant.
reviews.text: Alles prima muv het restaurant: bij het diner taaie smakeloze kip en bij het ontbijt bevroren yoghurt en oud brood.

reviews.title: Fantastisch
reviews.text: We hebben een geweldig verblijf gehad.  De kamer was groot met een heerlijk bed.  Het ontbijtbuffet heeft iets minder keuze gehad.

reviews.title: ノーコメント
reviews.text: 食事が悪い
reviews.positives: なし

reviews.title: 居心地のいいホテル
reviews.text: 場所が中心部でないのでホテルから出ると不便。
reviews.positives: 部屋。コストパフォーマンス。静かさ。

reviews.title: staff was so friendly
reviews.text:
Longxyenでは快適なホテルだと思います。いわゆる地方のホテルですが、特にホテル内、部屋内で不自由はありません。
バスタブもあるので、ゆっくり湯船に浸かることができます。若干、中心地までは離れていますが、散歩がてらに徒歩でも可。
バイクタクシーも大した値段ではありませんので特にネガティブな要素ではありません。
reviews.positives: スタッフが新設。屋上レストランの雰囲気がいい。Longxyenでは快適なホテル

reviews.title: 改装してありました。
reviews.text: ロンスエンの中ではここが、1番好き。今回は改装してあってクロスとエアコンが新品でした。バスタオルも新しくて良かったです。

reviews.title: いつも泊まります。
reviews.text: 古いし設備も普通だがこの辺りでは1番良いホテルです。スタッフが皆気さくで安心して泊まれます。

reviews.title: 建物や設備は古いけどスタッフが最高
reviews.text: 建物や設備は古くてプールもいつ水換えましたか？と聴きたくなりますがスタッフが最高に良い人が揃っています。タオルだけ新しくて綺麗です。私はそこが一番大切です。いつも利用しています。

reviews.title: 物価の安いロンスエン
reviews.text: ロンスエンは南部デルタ米作の中心地でさほど観光客が目立つわけでもないが物価が極めて安く感じられる。
reviews.positives: 静かな環境、安価な宿泊費、宿泊費に朝食付き

reviews.title: この地区ではOK
reviews.text: ホテルの少ないこの地域ではOKなホテルです。

reviews.title: 満足できました。
reviews.text: この近隣では1番良かったです。バスルームの水漏れがなかったホテルは私が泊まったホテルでここだけです。バスタオルもまあ合格です。その他のホテルは雑巾のようなバスタオルです。スタッフも感じがよく大変満足できました。また泊まります。

reviews.title: いい感じです
reviews.text:
この辺りでは一番大きなホテルです。Futaバスならバスターミナルから無料で送ってくれるので便利です。部屋は豪華でみはらしもよい。コスパ最高、朝食は食べる時間がありませんでした。ただプールは微妙でないと思った方がよいでしょう。
歩いて10分くらいでデパートに着きます。周辺には何件かカフェがありますががっつり食べるレストランはなさそうです。レストランを町の方まで探しましたがローカル食堂と屋台しかさがせませんでした、ロッテリアとジョリビーはあります。結局屋台のラーメンになりましたがすごくおいしくて2杯たべました。とうぜん激安です。
reviews.positives: きれい、ひろい、コスパがいい

reviews.title: 飯店附近沒有甚麼好逛的
reviews.text: 本來以為附近有夜市的，結果已經沒有了。最近的小七走路不會到，飯店房間大，但有歷史。一樓有保全，令人安心

reviews.title: 性價比高的酒店、地點好、早餐佳、房價低
reviews.text: 以四星級酒店而言：價格相當便宜、地點又位於鬧區中，旁邊就是足球場、住宿隔天有球賽，加油聲都聽得到。有游泳池、自助早餐在頂樓、風景宜人。房間雖小，卻很舒適。出入都有大門警衛，相當安心。
reviews.positives: 價格便宜、地點位於鬧區中，旁臨足球場、有游泳池、自助早餐在頂樓、風景宜人。房間雖小，卻很舒適。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 출장 때문에 묵었는데 오래된 호텔이라 시설은 낡은감이 있지만 지낼만 했습니다. 다만 화장실 욕조에 찌꺼기가 너무 많아서..바로 청소해주시긴했어요

이용해요. 가성비 좋아요. 조식도 그나마 먹을만해요. 메뉴는 메일 거진 비슷한 메뉴네요.

reviews.title: Ks thật tồi tệ
reviews.text: Mình book cho cty đi công tác, book cho 5 phòng, book trên agoda đã thành công và có số booking number, thế mà đến đó ks ko áp dụng. Bắt sếp và công ty  ở phòng mắc hơn, quá vô lý.  vì mình book phòng trên agoda dc giá ưu đãi.  Mình sẽ ko bao giờ quay lại .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Tôi đặt phòng ở đây nhưng tôi không thể đến đây từ phú quốc do bão. Tôi có liên hệ agoda để được hỗ trợ huỷ phòng trong trường hợp này nhưng không được chấp nhận. Tôi hi vọng là xem xét lại những trường hợp tương tự. Làm ăn cần dựa vào chữ tín và cái tâm!

reviews.positives: Địa điểm , nhân viên phục vụ , bãi đậu xe tốt

reviews.title: Khách sạn tốt nhất ở đây
reviews.text: Thật sự thì đi An Giang sẽ k có nhiều lựa chọn, mình thấy giá ở agoda so với khách sạn thì agoda tốt hơn mà k hiểu sao vẫn có nhiều người nhận xét đặt trực tiếp khách sạn giá thấp hơn nhỉ? (mình có gọi trực tiếp đến khách sạn để so sánh giá sau khi đọc vài bình luận từ nhiều nơi đó) Nói chung thông tin là mình đọc, nhưng để kiểm chứng thì cũng do chính mình thôi.

reviews.title: Khach San
reviews.text:
Chung toi that khong hai long khi dat khach san nay. Gia dinh toi gom 2 nguoi lon va 2 em be , chung toi dat phong loai 3 nguoi de co them giuong cho 2 dua nho. Den khi nhan phong chung toi phai nhan 1 phong 2 nguoi chi them 1 phieu an sang , so voi so tien tra them cho loai phong 3 nguoi thi qua mac.
Toi khong hieu phan sale cua khach san lam viec voi agoda nhu the nao ma dua len ban loai phong 3 nguoi nay ma chi cung cap co 2 giuong twin. Trong phong cai gi cung chi cung cap co 2  , khong co tra va cafe mien phi nhu cac ks khac. Cua toilet bi hong dong vao khong mo ra duoc , phai goi tiep tan mang Len chia khoa de mo cua toilet, that la buc boi . Toi la mot thanh vien cua Agoda lau nam toi rat phien long khi dat ks nay. Tuy la 4 sao nhung toi thay dich vu o day phuc vu thua khach san 2 sao ruoi toi dat o Cambodia.
reviews.positives: Trung tam

reviews.title: Cảm nhận
reviews.text:
Sao mình book ở agoda lại mắc hơn giá niêm yết tại KS vậy? Vậy book trực tiếp tại KS lợi hơn. 
Mình cứ nghĩ book agoda sẽ rẽ hơn, nó làm mình phải cân nhắc khi book trên agoda cho những lần tới.
